auth.label: API Token
auth.description: Control D API token used with the Authorization Bearer header. Create and manage it from the Control D dashboard API page: https://docs.controld.com/docs/org-api

actions.name: delete_profile_rule
actions.description: Delete one root-folder custom DNS rule from a Control D profile.

profileId.description: The Control D profile primary key.

ruleId.description: The Control D rule primary key, usually a hostname or wildcard pattern.

forceOrgId.description: Optional child organization ID forwarded as the X-Force-Org-Id header.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for deleting one Control D custom rule.

deleted.description: Whether the Control D rule delete request succeeded.

profileId.description: The Control D profile primary key.

ruleId.description: The rule primary key that was deleted.

message.description: The optional confirmation message returned by Control D.

actions.name: get_current_ip
actions.description: Return the current IP address and datacenter seen by the Control D API for troubleshooting API token allowed-IP issues.

inputSchema.description: No input parameters for retrieving the current Control D IP context.

ip.description: The current IP address seen by the Control D API.

type.description: The IP version label returned by Control D.

org.description: The organization or ISP associated with the current IP address.

country.description: The country code associated with the current IP address.

handler.description: The Control D datacenter that handled the request.

actions.name: get_profile
actions.description: Fetch one Control D profile by primary key.

profileId.description: The Control D profile primary key.

forceOrgId.description: Optional child organization ID forwarded as the X-Force-Org-Id header.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for fetching one Control D profile.

PK.description: The Control D profile primary key.

name.description: The profile display name returned by Control D.

stats.description: The analytics level configured for the profile.

da.description: The default action configuration returned by Control D.

count.description: The number of items reported by Control D for this area.

flt.description: A count summary returned by Control D.

count.description: The number of items reported by Control D for this area.

grp.description: A count summary returned by Control D.

count.description: The number of items reported by Control D for this area.

svc.description: A count summary returned by Control D.

count.description: The number of items reported by Control D for this area.

cflt.description: A count summary returned by Control D.

count.description: The number of items reported by Control D for this area.

rule.description: A count summary returned by Control D.

count.description: The number of items reported by Control D for this area.

ipflt.description: A count summary returned by Control D.

profile.description: The nested profile summary returned by Control D.

updated.description: The Unix timestamp of the last profile update.

profile.description: A Control D profile returned by the API.

actions.name: list_profile_rules
actions.description: List the root-folder custom DNS rules configured on a Control D profile.

profileId.description: The Control D profile primary key.

forceOrgId.description: Optional child organization ID forwarded as the X-Force-Org-Id header.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing custom DNS rules.

PK.description: The rule primary key, usually the hostname pattern.

group.description: The numeric folder identifier that contains the rule.

order.description: The evaluation order of the rule within the folder.

do.description: The Control D rule action code: 0=BLOCK, 1=BYPASS, 2=SPOOF, 3=REDIRECT.

status.description: The Control D rule status code: 0=disabled, 1=enabled.

via.description: The spoof target or redirect location returned by Control D.

via_v6.description: The IPv6 spoof target returned by Control D.

action.description: The action payload of a Control D custom rule.

items.description: A Control D custom DNS rule.

rules.description: The custom DNS rules returned by Control D.

actions.name: list_profiles
actions.description: List the Control D profiles available to the authenticated API token.

forceOrgId.description: Optional child organization ID forwarded as the X-Force-Org-Id header.

PK.description: The Control D profile primary key.

name.description: The profile display name returned by Control D.

stats.description: The analytics level configured for the profile.

da.description: The default action configuration returned by Control D.

count.description: The number of items reported by Control D for this area.

flt.description: A count summary returned by Control D.

count.description: The number of items reported by Control D for this area.

grp.description: A count summary returned by Control D.

count.description: The number of items reported by Control D for this area.

svc.description: A count summary returned by Control D.

count.description: The number of items reported by Control D for this area.

cflt.description: A count summary returned by Control D.

count.description: The number of items reported by Control D for this area.

rule.description: A count summary returned by Control D.

count.description: The number of items reported by Control D for this area.

ipflt.description: A count summary returned by Control D.

profile.description: The nested profile summary returned by Control D.

updated.description: The Unix timestamp of the last profile update.

items.description: A Control D profile returned by the API.

profiles.description: The profiles returned by Control D.

actions.name: list_service_categories
actions.description: List the Control D service categories that can be used for service discovery.

inputSchema.description: No input parameters for listing Control D service categories.

PK.description: The service category primary key returned by Control D.

name.description: The display name of the service category.

description.description: The description of the service category.

count.description: The number of services in the category.

categories.description: The service categories returned by Control D.

actions.name: list_services_by_category
actions.description: List the Control D services available in one service category.

category.description: The Control D service category primary key.

PK.description: The service primary key returned by Control D.

name.description: The display name of the service.

category.description: The category primary key that owns the service.

unlock_location.description: The default unlock or redirect location returned by Control D.

warning.description: An optional warning attached to the service.

locations.description: Alternative location codes supported by the service.

items.description: A Control D service returned by the service catalog.

services.description: The services returned by Control D.

actions.name: upsert_profile_rule
actions.description: Create or replace root-folder custom DNS rules on a Control D profile for one or more hostname patterns.

profileId.description: The Control D profile primary key.

forceOrgId.description: Optional child organization ID forwarded as the X-Force-Org-Id header.

do.description: The Control D rule action code: 0=BLOCK, 1=BYPASS, 2=SPOOF, 3=REDIRECT.

status.description: The Control D rule status code: 0=disabled, 1=enabled.

items.description: One hostname or wildcard domain pattern.

hostnames.description: The hostname patterns to create or update in Control D.

via.description: The spoof target or redirect location to send upstream.

viaV6.description: The IPv6 spoof target to send upstream when do=2.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for creating or replacing Control D custom rules.

PK.description: The rule primary key, usually the hostname pattern.

group.description: The numeric folder identifier that contains the rule.

order.description: The evaluation order of the rule within the folder.

do.description: The Control D rule action code: 0=BLOCK, 1=BYPASS, 2=SPOOF, 3=REDIRECT.

status.description: The Control D rule status code: 0=disabled, 1=enabled.

via.description: The spoof target or redirect location returned by Control D.

via_v6.description: The IPv6 spoof target returned by Control D.

action.description: The action payload of a Control D custom rule.

items.description: A Control D custom DNS rule.

rules.description: The rules that match the requested hostname patterns after the write.
